famous quote:
"I have no duty to be anyone's Friend and no man in the world has a duty to be mine. No claims, no shadow of necessity. Friendship is unnecessary, like philosophy, like art, like the universe itself (for God did not need to create). It has no survival value; rather it is one of those things which give value to survival."
-- C.S. Lewis (The Four Loves)
User added:
""If you love me, you will obey my commandments."
窶ｭ窶ｭJohn窶ｬ 窶ｭ14:15窶ｬ 窶ｭNET窶ｬ窶ｬ窶ｬ窶ｬ窶ｬ窶ｬ

How many times have you read this in your heart as, "I will love you if..."? O, brothers and sisters in Christ, the love of our Savior is engraved on His hands, His head, His back, His feet, His side. Christ Jesus has loved you from eternity past to now, and will love you from now to eternity future. Nothing will change that! Now, Jesus says, you are free to do likewise. Today, live love, freely!

"For we are his workmanship, having been created in Christ Jesus for good works that God prepared beforehand so we may do them."
窶ｭ窶ｭEphesians窶ｬ 窶ｭ2:10窶ｬ 窶ｭNET窶ｬ窶ｬ窶ｬ窶ｬ窶ｬ窶ｬ

-Sean Lennon
Interview Text:
More Stories from Kevin: 

One of his other friends who regularly claims to hear from God asked him to skim over her journals one time. And afterwards he said it was as he expected. Just like another of his friend's journals and like his own, God's voice sounded the same. When he had a message for them it almost always sounded like something a very good father would say to his four year old. Just very simple and very loving. Like, "You are enough." "I love you so much." And "It's okay. You can just rest in my love. I'm here. You can trust me."

-Raw Spoon (from Miracles in America)
Music Video Instructions: Use this as inspiration to pray again. Say what you've been needing to say to God.
